name: Blackstone Beach
description: Aruba's most visually unusual shore — black stones against turquoise water.

rockiness.beach: Black volcanic pebbles and boulders — no classic sand beach
rockiness.ocean_floor: Rocky shore with immediate drop-off near boulders

characteristics.depth_profile: Rocky shore with immediate drop-off near volcanic boulders.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Dominant — smooth black volcanic pebbles and boulders instead of white sand
characteristics.sand: black stone shingle — no classic sand beach
fun_facts: Aruba's most visually unusual shore — black stones against turquoise water.
